summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Learned Dunnage Patterns feature. All backend and frontend features working correctly. Backend preflight endpoint returns pattern suggestions with correct quantities. Frontend displays Suggested Additions panel, Add All/individual Add buttons work, Reset restores original lines, sparkle icons show on pattern lines.

issues: React hydration warnings in console (button nested in button, span in tbody) - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: React hydration warnings due to nested button elements in PatternSuggestions component (button inside button) and span elements in table tbody - should be fixed for cleaner console output but doesn't affect functionality
seed_data_creation: Batch demo creates batch-child documents with C-9874 items that trigger dunnage suggestions. Run POST /api/sales-dashboard/demo/run-batch to seed data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Learned Dunnage Patterns feature fully tested. Backend preflight endpoint at /api/gpi-integration/sales-orders/preflight/{doc_id} returns pattern_suggestions in resolved_lines with suggested=true and source=learned_pattern. Frontend review page at /review/{doc_id} shows Suggested Additions panel with Add All and individual Add buttons. Use batch-child documents with C-9874 items (e.g., C-9874-10001833) to test pattern suggestions. Quantities: OIPALLET=22, OITIERSHEET=308, OITOPFRAME=22 for qty 62.062.

backend: Suggested lines have suggested=true and source=learned_pattern - PASS
Correct quantities for C-9874 items (OIPALLET=22, OITIERSHEET=308, OITOPFRAME=22) - PASS
Non-C-9874 items don't get dunnage suggestions - PASS
Batch demo seeds pattern data correctly - PASS
frontend: /review/{id} page loads and auto-runs preflight for batch-child docs - PASS
Suggested Additions panel appears with correct count badge (5 lines) - PASS
Individual Add button moves suggestion into editable lines table - PASS
Add All button moves all suggestions into editable lines table - PASS
After adding all, panel shows 'learned dunnage lines added to this order' confirmation - PASS
Added pattern lines show sparkle icon visual distinction - PASS
Line Preview count updates after adding suggestions (1 to 6) - PASS
Confirmation bar shows updated line count and total - PASS
Reset button restores original lines (removes added pattern lines) - PASS

mocked_apis.BC Sandbox: DEMO_MODE=true - BC Sales Order creation is mocked
